subcodes.first_line: O kind friend! Gushtasp was the sovereign lord of the world and the crowned monarch of all existence, yet in the end that foundation fell to ruin [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان گشتاسب سرور جهان بود و تاجدار کیهان ولی بپایان آن بنیان ویران
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
